summary: Core user loop simplification tested for iteration 71. Frontend loads correctly. HomeTab reorder verified: EntryLayer → DailyBaseSelection (confirmed) → base-gate → FieldImpactLayer → Atmosphere toggle (collapsed) → Community toggle (collapsed). Backend APIs working: auth, trust, invite, daily-base, daily-question. New components TrustChangeCard and InlineInviteCard are implemented but only show after action completion in current session (NOT when page loads with already-completed action).

minor.issue: Returns 200 instead of 401 for invalid credentials (returns success:false inside 200)

ui_bugs.issue: TrustChangeCard and InlineInviteCard do NOT show when page loads with already-completed action. They only appear after user clicks answer button in current session. actionCompleted state not initialized from API response.

action_items: FIX (MEDIUM): HomeTab should initialize actionCompleted=true when DailyOrientationQuestion loads with already_answered_today=true. Currently TrustChangeCard and InlineInviteCard only show if user completes action in current session.
critical_code_review_comments: HomeTab.js: actionCompleted state only set via onActionRecorded callback, not from API. Should check initial state.
TrustChangeCard.js: Clean implementation, fetches from /api/user/{userId}/trust correctly
InlineInviteCard.js: Clean implementation, fetches from /api/invites/me with auth, auto-generates if no active codes
RetentionNudges.js: Correctly removed invite nudge - only mission, globe, return nudges remain
DailyBaseSelection.js: Correctly renders confirmed view or selection view based on API response

success_rate.backend: 89% (8/9 tests passed - 1 minor login status code issue)
success_rate.frontend: 85% (Core layout correct, toggles work, but post-action cards not showing on reload)

seed_data_used.existing_user: newuser@test.com with base already selected (heart) and action already completed today

verified_components.HomeTab_order: CORRECT: EntryLayer → DailyBaseSelection → base-gate → FieldImpactLayer → toggle-atmosphere → toggle-community
verified_components.DailyBaseSelection: WORKING - shows confirmed view when base selected, selection view otherwise
verified_components.DailyOrientationQuestion: WORKING - shows question with answer button, completed state after answer
verified_components.TrustChangeCard: IMPLEMENTED - requires actionCompleted state to be true
verified_components.InlineInviteCard: IMPLEMENTED - requires actionCompleted state to be true
verified_components.RetentionNudges: CORRECT - invite nudge removed, only mission/globe/return remain
verified_components.Atmosphere_toggle: WORKING - collapsed by default, expands on click
verified_components.Community_toggle: WORKING - collapsed by default, expands on click
verified_components.InviteSection: EXISTS in community section (verified in code, loading state in UI)

verified_apis.GET /api/invites/me: 200 with auth - returns codes list with active_count, used_count
verified_apis.GET /api/orientation/daily-question/{use: 200 - returns daily question with completion state

context_for_next_testing_agent: HomeTab reorder completed. Key issue: TrustChangeCard and InlineInviteCard don't show when action was completed in previous session. The actionCompleted state in HomeTab only gets set when user clicks answer button during current session. Fix needed in HomeTab.js to initialize actionCompleted based on DailyOrientationQuestion's already_answered_today response. RetentionNudges correctly removed invite nudge. All toggle sections work correctly.

mocked_apis.note: All APIs use real database operations
